content.speakerText: I'm really grateful for everything you've taught me.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你教我的一切。

options.text: You're welcome, I did it for the money.
You've been a great asset—we'll miss you.
I didn't do much, don't mention it.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了真诚回应和正面反馈，符合职场礼貌道别的情境。选项1过于功利，选项3态度敷衍，选项4过度贬低自己，都不符合建立积极关系的语境。

content.speakerText: I hope we can stay in touch—I'd love to hear how things go for you.
content.speakerTextCn: 希望我们能保持联系，很想听你未来的发展。

options.text: Sure, I'll probably forget your name anyway.
We don't need to keep in touch—it's just work.

content.explanation: 正确答案展现了主动维持关系的积极态度。选项1和3消极且不礼貌，选项4否定关系价值，均违背礼貌道别原则。

content.speakerText: It's been such a pleasure working with you!
content.speakerTextCn: 和你共事真的非常愉快！

options.text: Same here—I hope you have a wonderful next chapter.
Yeah, me too. Anyway, I gotta go.
I didn't like most of your ideas.
Thanks, but I'm not sure I'll ever see you again.

content.explanation: 正确答案既表达了共鸣，又送上美好祝福，完整体现礼貌道别。选项2仓促结束，选项3负面评价，选项4消极悲观，均破坏对话氛围。

content.template: I'm really grateful for everything you've taught me. ___ that means a lot.
content.hint: 回应感谢时常用简洁表达，注意首字母大写
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Thanks, that means a lot.（回应感谢的礼貌句型）

content.template: Let's ___ coffee sometime—I'd love to catch up!
content.hint: 口语中表示‘约喝咖啡’的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：grab coffee（非正式但地道的社交邀约表达）

content.template: I truly appreciate your support—___ you a wonderful future!
content.hint: 祝福语常用结构：Wishing you + 名词/形容词
content.knowledgePoint: 祝福句型：Wishing you...（礼貌道别中的高级表达）

content.speakerText: I'm really grateful for everything you've taught me.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你教我的一切。
expectedAnswers: You've been a great asset—we'll miss you.
I truly appreciate your guidance, and I hope you're doing amazing!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚的回应与情感共鸣
语言准确性：语法正确，用词得体，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 gratitude, appreciate, miss 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I hope we can stay in touch—I'd love to hear how things go for you.
content.speakerTextCn: 希望我们能保持联系，很想听你未来的发展。
expectedAnswers: Will do. I’ll send you a connection request this week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动提出后续联系方式，延续关系
语言准确性：使用了恰当的动词短语如 'message on LinkedIn' 或 'grab coffee'
表达自然度：语气友好、非机械，符合真实对话节奏
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 stay in touch, message, catch up 等关键词

content.speakerText: It's been a joy working with you. I wish you all the best!
content.speakerTextCn: 和你共事非常愉快，祝你一切顺利！
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much—I’ll miss working with you too!
Same here! I hope you find something even more amazing next.
I really appreciate that. Let’s not say goodbye—just see you soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应祝福并表达情感共鸣
语言准确性：语法结构完整，无中式英语表达
表达自然度：语气温暖、真诚，符合告别场景的情感基调
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 joy, best, miss, see you soon 等道别关键词
